descriptionTemplate: Wanda gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 5 stacks of {Dreamlure}. Gain 1 stack of {Dreamlure} At turn start. Whenever {Dreamlure} reaches 5 or 10 stacks, gain [Block:Arg2] Shield.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Wanda gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 5 stacks of {Dreamlure}. Gain 1 stack of {Dreamlure} at turn start. Whenever gaining {Dreamlure} brings it to 5 or 10 stacks, gain [Block:Arg2] Shield. After Wanda uses her Exalt, her next 2 Command Cards take effect 1 extra time.
